content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
RISK-ON — low volatility (Vol: 23.4%) with broad participation (Breadth: 7/8 sectors positive); market tone is bullish and risk-seeking.

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Banking & Finance ABOVE TREND: AKBNK (1W: +12.74% | 1M: +31.59%) ABOVE TREND; YKBNK (1W: +13.86% | 1M: +35.06%) ABOVE TREND. Transportation ABOVE TREND: TAVHL (1W: +8.00% | 1M: +21.32%) ABOVE TREND. Heavy Industry ABOVE TREND: TOASO (1W: +10.91% | 1M: +16.95%) ABOVE TREND.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Technology & Telecom BELOW TREND: KONTR (1W: -8.73% | 1M: -30.92%) BELOW TREND and TTKOM (1W: -1.56% | 1M: +9.83%) CORRECTION show clear weakness. Energy & Chemicals has dispersion with TUPRS (1W: -2.95% | 1M: -6.12%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
TRALT (1W: +18.25% | 1M: +25.61%) ABOVE TREND; YKBNK (1W: +13.86% | 1M: +35.06%) ABOVE TREND; AKBNK (1W: +12.74% | 1M: +31.59%) ABOVE TREND; TOASO (1W: +10.91% | 1M: +16.95%) ABOVE TREND; EKGYO (1W: +10.20% | 1M: +19.17%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: -8.73% | 1M: -30.92%) BELOW TREND; TUPRS (1W: -2.95% | 1M: -6.12%) BELOW TREND; ALARK (1W: -3.18% | 1M: +14.22%) CORRECTION; CCOLA (1W: -2.91% | 1M: +0.38%) CORRECTION; DOHOL (1W: -2.37% | 1M: -0.65%) BELOW TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
TRALT (1W: +18.25% | 1M: +25.61%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +13.86% | 1M: +35.06%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +12.74% | 1M: +31.59%) ABOVE TREND, TOASO (1W: +10.91% | 1M: +16.95%) ABOVE TREND, EKGYO (1W: +10.20% | 1M: +19.17%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banks leading the market; AKBNK (1W: +12.74% | 1M: +31.59%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +13.86% | 1M: +35.06%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +7.34% | 1M: +20.94%) ABOVE TREND — momentum intact, overweight large-cap banks for cyclical beta.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Heavy Industry showing broad gains: TOASO (1W: +10.91% | 1M: +16.95%) ABOVE TREND, EREGL (1W: +1.68% | 1M: +15.30%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +8.42% | 1M: +6.55%) ABOVE TREND — preferred exposure to autos and defense names.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Mixed but positive overall: TRALT (1W: +18.25% | 1M: +25.61%) ABOVE TREND and TRMET (1W: +8.08% | 1M: +13.52%) ABOVE TREND outperform, while TUPRS (1W: -2.95% | 1M: -6.12%) BELOW TREND is a clear lag — selectivity required.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Risk-on stance: overweight Banking & Finance and cyclical Industrials (autos, transport, select heavy industry), maintain tactical overweight in high-momentum names (TRALT, AKBNK, YKBNK); trim Technology & Telecom and lagging energy names (TUPRS, KONTR) until confirmations.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
AKBNK (1W: +12.74% | 1M: +31.59%) ABOVE TREND for follow-through; YKBNK (1W: +13.86% | 1M: +35.06%) ABOVE TREND on bank flows; TRALT (1W: +18.25% | 1M: +25.61%) ABOVE TREND as momentum trade; TOASO (1W: +10.91% | 1M: +16.95%) ABOVE TREND for sector re-rating.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Banking & Finance for leadership continuation, Transportation for cyclical recovery; monitor Technology & Telecom for downside risk and potential flow reversals.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Watch XU100 for follow-through above recent highs (momentum confirmation) and failure below short-term consolidation as the trigger for de-risking; catalysts: Q2 corporate updates, CBRT commentary, USD/TRY moves and oil prices that will affect Energy & Banks.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

RISK-ON market with low volatility and broad sector participation (Vol: 23.4%, Breadth: 7/8); banking and cyclical industrials are driving gains. Trade overweight banks and select industrials (AKBNK, YKBNK, TOASO, TRALT) while avoiding weak TMT names and underperforming energy exposures (KONTR, TUPRS).
